title: The AI notetaker that stays on your Mac.
content_html:
threadfork records, transcribes, and connects every conversation on-device. No bot joins your calls, no audio touches the cloud — just a private knowledge base that compounds with every meeting.

macOS 14+ · Apple Silicon · 14-day free trial

12:04

Record

One click — or let your calendar start it. Mic and system audio, so it works for Zoom, Meet, Teams, and the room you're sitting in. No bot joins the call.

Process

Local models transcribe, identify speakers, and extract summaries, commitments, and entities — on your hardware, even offline.

Explore

Search by meaning with typed filters, jump anywhere with ⌘K, and follow people and topics across every meeting you've ever had.

NOTES

A workspace, not a transcript viewer.

Open notes in tabs, edit them like a document — rich markdown tables included — and keep every line linked to the moment it was said. That’s a real capture, not a mockup.

THREADS

Every “I’ll do that” becomes a thread.

Commitments, decisions, and open questions are pulled out of the conversation automatically — with an owner, a deadline, and a link back to the exact moment it was said. Check them off, or let the next meeting close them for you.

SEARCH

Ask your meetings anything. Locally.

⌘K opens semantic search across every transcript, summary, and thread. Type filters as you think them — a person, a topic, a date range — and get the exact moment, not just the meeting it happened in.

ENTITIES

People and topics that compound.

Every person, company, and topic becomes an entity with its own timeline. Open “Acme” and see every mention across four months of meetings — what was promised, what changed, and who said it.

PRIVATE BY DEFAULT

Your meetings are the most sensitive data you produce. Treat them that way.

Cloud notetakers upload every word you say to someone else’s servers. threadfork’s entire pipeline — transcription, extraction, search, chat — runs on your Mac’s own silicon.

On-device processingAudio never leaves your machine. Models run locally on Apple Silicon.

No bot in the roomthreadfork listens from your computer’s audio. Nobody sees "Notetaker joined."

Works offlineOn a plane, in a SCIF, on client wifi — record and search without a connection.

You choose what leavesNothing is shared or exported unless you do it. Markdown, TXT, JSON, SRT.

One plan. Everything included.

Try everything free for 14 days. No feature gates, no per-minute metering.

Pro$39 /month

A private AI workspace for meetings, notes, memory, and follow-up.

Unlimited recordings, up to 3 hours eachLocal transcription with speaker IDSummaries, threads, and entity extractionSemantic search and AI assistantCalendar context and projectsExport to Markdown, TXT, JSON, SRT

Start free trial

After the trial, your history stays viewable and searchable.

EnterpriseCustom

For teams that need deployment, security review, or procurement support.

Everything in ProTeam deployment optionsSecurity & compliance review supportCustom retention and limitsPriority support and onboarding

Contact sales

Your next meeting is worth remembering.

Download threadfork and record your first meeting in under a minute.

Not on Apple Silicon? Leave your email — we'll tell you if that changes.

Free for 14 days · No credit card · macOS 14+

content_html_zh:
threadfork 记录、转录并连接设备上的每个对话。 没有机器人加入您的通话，没有音频触及云端——只有一个与每次会议相结合的私人知识库。

macOS 14+ · Apple Silicon · 14 天免费试用

12:04

记录

一键点击 - 或者让您的日历启动它。 麦克风和系统音频，因此它适用于 Zoom、Meet、Teams 以及您所在的房间。 没有机器人加入通话。

过程

本地模型可以在您的硬件上（甚至离线）进行转录、识别发言者并提取摘要、承诺和实体。

探索

使用键入的过滤器按含义进行搜索，使用 ⌘K 跳转到任何位置，并在您参加过的每次会议中关注人员和主题。

NOTES

工作区，而不是成绩单查看器。

在选项卡中打开笔记，像文档一样编辑它们（包括丰富的 Markdown 表格），并使每一行都链接到所说的那一刻。 这是真实的捕捉，而不是模型。

线程

每一个“我会这么做”都会成为一条线索。

承诺、决定和悬而未决的问题都会自动从对话中退出——带有所有者、截止日期和返回到所说的确切时刻的链接。 勾选它们，或者让下一次会议为您关闭它们。

搜索

向你的会议提出任何问题。 本地。

⌘K 在每个记录、摘要和线程中打开语义搜索。 输入您认为的过滤器（人物、主题、日期范围）并获取准确的时刻，而不仅仅是发生的会议。

实体

复合的人和话题。

每个人、每个公司、每个主题都成为一个拥有自己的时间线的实体。 打开“Acme”，查看四个月会议中提到的每一个内容——承诺了什么、改变了什么以及谁说的。

默认为私有

您的会议是您产生的最敏感的数据。 就这样对待他们。

云记事员会将你所说的每一个字上传到其他人的服务器上。 threadfork 的整个管道（转录、提取、搜索、聊天）都在您的 Mac 自己的芯片上运行。

设备上处理音频永远不会离开您的机器。 模型在 Apple Silicon 上本地运行。

roomthreadfork 中的机器人不会监听您计算机的音频。 没有人看到“Notetaker 已加入”。

离线工作在飞机上、SCIF 中、客户端 WiFi 上 — 无需连接即可记录和搜索。

您可以选择留下什么，除非您这样做，否则不会共享或导出任何内容。 Markdown、TXT、JSON、SRT。

一个计划。 一切都包括在内。

14 天免费试用所有内容。 没有功能门，没有每分钟计量。

专业版$39/月

用于会议、笔记、记忆和跟进的私人 AI 工作空间。

无限录音，每次最多 3 小时带有说话者 ID 的本地转录摘要、线程和实体提取语义搜索和 AI 助手日历上下文和项目导出为 Markdown、TXT、JSON、SRT

开始免费试用

试用后，您的历史记录仍然可以查看和搜索。

企业定制

适用于需要部署、安全审查或采购支持的团队。

ProTeam 部署选项中的一切安全与合规性审查支持自定义保留和限制优先支持和入职

联系销售人员

您的下一次会议值得记住。

下载 threadfork 并在一分钟内记录您的第一次会议。

不在 Apple Silicon 上吗？ 留下您的电子邮件——如果情况发生变化，我们会告诉您。

14 天免费 · 无需信用卡 · macOS 14+
